mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expenses (id, trip_id, activity_id, amount, currency, exchange_rate, amount_in_trip_currency, category, description, paid_by, paid_by_guest_name, paid_by_guest_member_id, receipt_url, photo_urls, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{exchangeRate}, #{amountInTripCurrency}, #{category}, #{description}, #{paidBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{paidByGuestName}, #{paidByGuestMemberId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{receiptUrl}, #{photoUrls,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.ArrayTypeHandler}, #{createdBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM expenses WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE expenses SET amount = #{amount}, currency = #{currency}, exchange_rate = #{exchangeRate}, amount_in_trip_currency = #{amountInTripCurrency}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, paid_by = #{paidBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, paid_by_guest_name = #{paidByGuestName}, paid_by_guest_member_id = #{paidByGuestMemberId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, photo_urls = #{photoUrls,jdbcType=ARRAY,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.ArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM expenses WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM expenses WHERE paid_by = #{paidBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM expenses ORDER BY created_at DESC
